name: BERT
training_approach: self-supervised pretraining with MLM and NSP on BooksCorpus + English Wikipedia
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> BERT
summary: BERT revolutionized NLP by introducing bidirectional pretraining via masked language modeling, allowing the model to attend to both left and right context simultaneously. It achieved state-of-the-art results across 11 NLP benchmarks upon release and established the pretrain-then-finetune paradigm that became the dominant approach in NLP, spawning an entire family of encoder-only models and making transfer learning standard practice in the field.
